title: lasiochloa laevis
intro: Lasiochloa laevis, also known as the smooth grass or silky grass, is a type of grass that is native to Australia. It has been traditionally used by indigenous Australians for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, offering benefits such as reduced inflammation and improved wound healing. In herbal preparations, Lasiochloa laevis is often used in teas, infusions, and topical creams to harness its medicinal properties.
